canonical_definition: A corpus of verb argument annotations (Kingsbury and Palmer, 2002) applied to the Penn Treebank, providing the verb-specific tense and aspect labels used in this study.
papers: Conflicting Needles in a Haystack: HowLLMs behave when faced with contradictory information
Will It Still Be True Tomorrow? Multilingual Evergreen Question Classification to Improve TrustworthyQA
